name: Dashboard (List View)
useCase: Primary landing screen after login. App shell pattern used across all EG products. Contains the full navigation structure (sidebar + tabs) with a main content area showing a searchable, filterable, paginated data table. Use this as the base layout for any screen that lists records and allows navigation between sections.
layout: App shell: collapsible left sidebar (Navigation Drawer), top tabs, main content area with toolbar and data table.
